LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS LISA PHAM, AN PHAM, TRUC DAM AND ROSE DAM'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIMS AS TO SAID DEFENDANTS FROM THE PLAINTIFFS OPERATIVE COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 23, 2013, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLEASE PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION BY JUNE 26, 2013, WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Punitive Damages Allegation And Punitive Damages Claims As To Said Defts From The Pltfs Operative Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs LISA PHAM, AN PHAM, TRUC DAM abd ROSE DAM's Motion To Strike The Punitive Damages Allegation And Punitive Damages Claims As To Said Defendants From The Plaintiffs' Operative Complaint is GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts re: malice and conscious disregard of probable dangerous consequences. Prevailing party to submit order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Punitive Damages Allegation And Punitive Damages Claims As To Said Defts From The Pltfs Operative Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Continued To Aug-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LISA PHAM, AN PHAM, TRUC DAM and ROSE DAM'S Motion To Strike The Punitive Damages Allegation And Punitive Damages Claims As To Said Defendants From The Plaintiffs' Operative Complaint is Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on the August 6, 2013. (See SFLR 8.10.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Punitive Damages Allegation And Punitive Damages Claims As To Said Defts From The Pltfs Operative Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS LISA PHAM, AN PHAM, TRUC DAM AND ROSE DAM's Motion To Strike The Punitive Damages Allegation And Punitive Damages Claims As To Said Defendants From The Plaintiffs Operative Complaint is continued to July 23, 2013, to give the opposing party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Please provide a courtesy copy of the opposition by June 26, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
